task_completion.description: Verify that the required apparatus shapes are added to the canvas.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The EdrawMax canvas contains shapes representing a Bunsen Burner, a Tripod or Iron Stand, a Round Bottom Flask, a Thermometer, a Condenser, and a collection Beaker or Conical Flask.

task_completion.description: Verify that the apparatus shapes are logically assembled into a distillation setup.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The shapes are arranged correctly: the flask is positioned over the burner/stand, the thermometer is placed at the top of the flask, the condenser is attached to the side arm of the flask, and the beaker/conical flask is positioned at the lower end of the condenser.

task_completion.description: Verify that all required text labels are present on the diagram.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text boxes containing exactly 'Bunsen Burner', 'Distillation Flask', 'Thermometer', 'Condenser', 'Distillate', 'Cooling Water In', and 'Cooling Water Out' are visible on the canvas, pointing to or placed near their respective components.

task_completion.description: Verify that the required title is added to the diagram.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text box containing the title 'Figure 1: Simple Distillation Setup' is clearly visible on the canvas.

task_completion.description: Verify that the diagram is saved as an .eddx file to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The EdrawMax save dialog shows the file being saved as 'distillation_setup.eddx' in the '/home/ga/Documents' directory, or the application title bar updates to show this filename.

task_completion.description: Verify that the diagram is exported as a PNG image to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The EdrawMax export dialog shows the file being exported as 'distillation_setup.png' in the '/home/ga/Documents' directory, or a file manager window confirms its presence.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the EdrawMax GUI to create the diagram.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with the EdrawMax interface, such as dragging shapes from the library panels and using the text tool, rather than writing XML/EDDX code in a text editor.

integrity.description: Ensure the diagram was constructed from scratch using shapes, not by pasting a pre-existing image.
integrity.visual_evidence: The diagram should clearly be composed of individual vector shapes and text boxes native to EdrawMax, rather than a single flat image of a distillation setup pasted onto the canvas.

integrity.description: Ensure the files were saved and exported using the application's built-in features.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should be seen using the 'File -> Save' and 'File -> Export' menus in EdrawMax, rather than using terminal commands to create dummy files at the target paths.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The required labels are exactly: 'Bunsen Burner', 'Distillation Flask', 'Thermometer', 'Condenser', 'Distillate', 'Cooling Water In', 'Cooling Water Out', and the title 'Figure 1: Simple Distillation Setup'. The required shapes include a Burner, Flask, Condenser, Thermometer, and Beaker. The expected save path is /home/ga/Documents/distillation_setup.eddx and the expected export path is /home/ga/Documents/distillation_setup.png.
